batches.subject: Invitation to AI health Conference 2026
batches.htmlBody:
Dear Dr. {{name},

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to invite you and your research team to submit papers to ICAHCR 2026 — the International Conference on AI in Healthcare & Clinical Research, scheduled for August 22–23, 2026 (fully virtual).

ICAHCR 2026 is a ScholarVault Platinum-verified conference (92/100) covering six research tracks:
• AI in Diagnostics & Medical Imaging
• Drug Discovery & Genomics / Precision Medicine
• Telemedicine & Digital Health
• Hospital Operations AI & EHR Systems
• Clinical Research, Trials & Regulatory AI
• Health Data Privacy, Ethics & Federated Learning

Key details:
→ Paper Submission Deadline: June 30, 2026
→ Acceptance Notification: July 15, 2026
→ ISBN-registered proceedings with DOI per paper
→ Best Paper, Best Presentation & Young Researcher Awards
→ SDGs 3, 4, 9 & 17 aligned
→ 100% refund if withdrawn before July 1, 2026

The conference is organised under the ScholarVault Academic Network, India's first automated conference verification platform — so researchers can verify legitimacy before submitting, protecting your institution's academic reputation.

Submit papers or register here:
https://aihealth.scholarvault.in

Verification report: https://aihealth.scholarvault.in/badge

I would be glad to share the conference brochure or answer any questions.

Warm regards,
Shyam
Founder, ScholarVault
conferences@scholarvault.in
scholarvault.in
